reviews.review_title: Could be a good game if done right
reviews.review_description:
So I like the theme and graphics, I don't like the bare minimum tutorial how am I supposed to read the tutorial whilst being killed??

DO NOT ADVERTISE AS SITTING game play because that is a complete lie, how can you move out the way seated? There is no thumb stick movement.

It's actually impossible to win the weapons are weak and you just slam into enemies until you die.
It's like a rail shooter in a way, I guess since the only direction is forward and that an automatic movement you can't control.

I think it could be a very enjoyable game if you develop it.

The video is a lie, there is no. Menu no free play nothing you either in the game or return to the title screen and watch the same cut scene.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 🙏

We now have a beta version available that is almost identical to the final release version. 🎮✨
Please apply for access here:
https://www.meta.com/s/96mnrBfB0

We’ve also created a fan community on Discord, so please feel free to join us! 💬🔥
https://discord.gg/qzXvNNgf

We look forward to hearing your feedback! 🚀
